title: Fresco Fiesta Quesadillas
description: A simple and flavorful Mexican dish featuring crispy tortillas, gooey cheese, and a sprinkle of fresh fiesta flavors.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Place a tortilla in the pan and sprinkle shredded fresco and fromage on half of the tortilla.
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the filling.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the tortilla is crispy and the cheese is melted.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Repeat with remaining tortillas and filling.
Cut into wedges and serve hot.
